name: Cajun Patry Mix
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a 15 x 10 x 2 inch baking pan, melt butter in the oven.
Remove from heat and stir in parsley, celery salt, garlic powder, cayenne pepper, and hot pepper sauce.
Gradually add cereal, stirring until all pieces are evenly coated.
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes.
Add onions and mix well.
Spread on absorbent paper to cool. Store in an airtight container.
